name: Pumpkin & Cream Cheese Rollups
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 15 x 10 x 1 or 18-inch jelly roll pan with butter and line it with waxed paper.
2. Sift together the flour, baking powder, cinnamon, pumpkin pie spice, nutmeg, and salt; set aside.
3. Beat eggs and sugar until thick and fluffy. Beat in pumpkin and lemon juice.
4. Stir in the dry ingredients all at once.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan, spreading evenly with a spatula.
6. Sprinkle walnuts (or mix them into the filling).
7. Bake for 15 minutes at 350°F until the center springs back when lightly touched.
8. Loosen the edges of the cake around the sides with a knife.
9. Invert the cake onto a clean towel dusted with confectioners sugar, removing the waxed paper.
10. Trim 1/4-inch from all sides.
11. Roll up the cake and towel together from the short side.
12. Place seam side down on a wire rack to cool completely.
13. Unroll the cake.
14. Beat the remaining cream cheese, butter, and vanilla until smooth.
15. Spread the mixture over the cake.
16. Reroll the cake tightly and refrigerate.
